name: Ogami
description: Ogami is a minor antagonist in the Jujutsu Kaisen series. She was a curse user who worked with Jirou Awasaka in the past to make money. ~!However, their freedom to commit crimes and curse people stopped with [Satoru Gojou](https://anilist.co/character/127691/Satoru-Gojou)'s birth. Determined to reclaim their past lives, Ogami, Awasaka, and her grandson aligned themselves with [Kenjaku](https://anilist.co/character/289584/Kenjaku) during the Shibuya Incident.!~
